office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy, oversee departments and public works, and represent the county on regional boards.
race_blurb: Seven candidates seek the open seat. The dossiers primarily distinguish current government experience, while only one supplies a detailed fiscal platform.

candidates.summary: Onisko is Shelton's mayor and a city representative on the county Board of Health.

experience.basis: Current mayoral and county Board of Health service establish a relevant governing record.

candidates.summary: Cameron's filing is verified, but the dossier contains no identity-safe biography or detailed platform.
highlights: Official and local sources verify the candidacy [S1][S2]

candidates.summary: Gutierrez is a Shelton City Council member; no detailed county-commission platform was located.
highlights: Was elected to Shelton City Council in 2025 [S1][S2]

experience.basis: Current elected city service supports a modest proven-record placement.

candidates.summary: Lee's filing is verified, but the dossier contains no identity-safe biography or detailed platform.
highlights: Official and local sources verify the candidacy [S1][S2]

candidates.summary: Sullivan is a banking professional and rural-health fundraiser emphasizing fiscal stewardship, infrastructure, housing, and public services.
highlights: Calls for transparent budgeting and fiscal stewardship [S2]
Lists public safety, housing, broadband, roads, growth, health, and conservation as priorities [S2]

spending.basis: Her campaign explicitly foregrounds transparent budgeting and fiscal stewardship while maintaining services.

candidates.summary: Blush's filing is verified, but the dossier contains no identity-safe biography or detailed platform.
highlights: Official and local sources verify the candidacy [S1][S2]

candidates.summary: Schaefer is a senior county Public Works right-of-way agent with transportation-administration experience.
highlights: Works directly on county rights of way and public-works processes [S2][S3]

experience.basis: Direct senior county public-works experience supports a modest institutional-record placement.
